calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-07-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: July 5, 2006, Judge Pro Tem Richard Beckman, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeals, Respondent Raquel Baten appears in Pro Per,
Appellant Fernando Galo appears in Pro Per. Mr. Manuel Gongora appears as a translator for Raquel Baten. (Mr. Gongora also appeared on line 4) Mr. Fili Cisneros, previously sworn, appears a witness for Ms. Baten; Avelo Prado, previously sworn, appears as a witness for Mr. Galo.
10:20am
Ms. Baten, with the help of Mr. Gongora, presents her case in the narrative. Judge Beckman questions Ms. Baten through Mr. Gongora.
10:40am
The Judge then questions Mr. Prado with the help of Mr. Gongora
11:15am
Court takes a recess to allow appellant to get some suitcases she claimed were damaged by respondent.
12:21pm
Parties appear with the suitcases for the Judge's review. Matter is then submitted, and Ms. Baten takes the suitcases
